creator: marck@rinet.ru
text:
New version of ehnt released by nikw@martnet.com

Fix: ehnta-0.2-0.3.diff

 here is patch for ehnta port skeleton (net/ehnt) between versions 
 0.2 and 0.3

 also, files/ehnt.1 and files/ehntserv.8 should be deleted, as Nik
 has added them in standard source set.
